ground_truth.title: Electrician in Salt Lake City | 24/7 Electrical Services
ground_truth.main_content: Need a residential electrician in Salt Lake City? When hiring a professional, you deserve nothing less than the best. You want a licensed electrical contractor with the skills and knowledge to meet the requirements of your project. You need SameDay Heating & Air, Plumbing, and Electrical. We provide high-end electrical services to our residential customers in the Salt Lake City area. Rely on our licensed electricians for electrical repair, electrical installation, and electrical replacement. We offer 24-hour emergency electrical service any time of day or night. Our services include whole-house surge protection, hot tub services, indoor/outdoor lighting installation, light switch and outlet repair and installation, appliance installation, electrical circuit services, and wiring repair and replacement. Signs you need electrical repair include frequently tripping circuit breakers, flickering or dimming lights, excessive extension cords, sparks or arcing, electric shocks, discolored or warm outlets, and burning odors. A malfunctioning electrical system could be dangerous. Protect your family and reduce the risk of fire by calling a SameDay electrician at (801) 726-3329 for 24/7 electrical repair.
